headline: Assessing Autodesk (ADSK) Valuation After New AI Small‑Business Program And Renewed Growth Optimism
summary: Autodesk (ADSK) recently rolled out Autodesk for Small Business, a program targeting freelancers and smaller firms with AI focused product tweaks, flexible token purchasing, and limited time discounts and certification perks. See our latest analysis for Autodesk. The recent focus on AI features and small business customers comes as Autodesk’s share price sits at US$244.16, with a 7 day share price return of 3.96% and a year to date share price return down 14.85%.
